relationships: ber:Tadamsa tazzayrit ad tuɣal ɣer unerni aseggas i d-itteddun
ber:Tawwurt-nni n Yanni seg wakken tṣedded, tuɣal ur tezmir ara ad teldi
ber:Ad tessiweḍ Dzayer ad tuɣal d tamurt ideg tella tsinutlayt tameɣradant﹖
ber:Tagara tuɣal ur tessaweḍ ara ad teḥkem deg yiman-is
ber:Tenna-d tebɣa ad tuɣal s axxam ɣef uḍar
ber:Nettat tezmer ad tuɣal d tasegbart taneblalt
